Description: C-1 / C-2 leaders who set strategic direction and approve major decisions
Typical Titles / Roles (examples): CEO, COO, CMO, Chief Supply Chain Officer, Chief Risk Officer, Chief Digital Officer
Primary Focus: Macro market signals, category-level growth, competitive position, M&A & partnership opportunities, macro risk
Signal KPI Priority: Trend Scores, Heat Indices, Geo Maps — high-level, low-frequency, strategic horizon (3–12 months)

Description: Directors and VPs who translate corporate strategy into plans and roadmaps
Typical Titles / Roles (examples): VP Merchandising, Director of Marketing, Head of Revenue Growth, Head of Innovation, Director of Procurement
Primary Focus: Category trends, competitive landscape shifts, white-space opportunities, regulatory change, consumer macro shifts
Signal KPI Priority: Trend Scores, Ranked Lists, Sentiment — medium frequency, 1–6 month horizon

Description: Managers who own specific functional KPIs and run day-to-day operations
Typical Titles / Roles (examples): Merchandising Manager, Trade Marketing Manager, Supply Chain Manager, Category Manager, CRM Manager, Promotions Manager
Primary Focus: In-week competitor moves, promo activity, supply disruption signals, demand spikes, campaign performance benchmarks
Signal KPI Priority: Event Pulse, Price Tracker, Velocity — high frequency, daily to weekly horizon

Description: Analysts and data scientists who generate insight and build models from data
Typical Titles / Roles (examples): Demand Planner, Pricing Analyst, Data Analyst, Consumer Insights Analyst, Revenue Assurance Manager, Yield Analyst
Primary Focus: Statistical trends, forecast signal inputs, volatility indices, model input data, benchmark comparisons
Signal KPI Priority: Velocity, Heat Index, Trend Score — all frequencies; raw signal fidelity over summarisation

Description: Engineers, scientists and deep specialists who build, maintain or optimise systems and products
Typical Titles / Roles (examples): R&D Scientist, Process Engineer, ML Engineer, Infrastructure Engineer, Yield Engineer, Grid Engineer, Formulation Scientist
Primary Focus: Technology trends, research publication velocity, equipment/tool innovation, standards & compliance changes
Signal KPI Priority: Velocity, Event Pulse — focused on technical horizon signals; low frequency but high precision

Description: Customer-facing, floor-level and field execution roles who interface directly with customers or assets
Typical Titles / Roles (examples): Store Manager, Beauty Advisor, Branch Manager, Device Sales Manager, Field Service Manager, Patient Recruitment Manager
Primary Focus: Real-time local demand, customer sentiment, competitor in-store activity, product/service buzz in local market
Signal KPI Priority: Sentiment, Event Pulse, Ranked List — real-time and hyper-local signals

Description: Risk, compliance, legal and regulatory oversight roles who manage exposure and obligations
Typical Titles / Roles (examples): Compliance Officer, Regulatory Affairs Manager, EHS Manager, Risk Manager, Trust & Safety Analyst, IP Manager
Primary Focus: Regulatory change, enforcement actions, ESG mandates, policy shifts, litigation trends, fraud typology evolution
Signal KPI Priority: Event Pulse, Ranked List — regulatory calendar driven; forward-looking horizon of 3–18 months
